docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LEI, CRYSTAL AS TO DEFENDANT LI, CHARLES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2011 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEI, CRYSTAL AS TO DEFENDANT LI, CHARLES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-08-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LI, CHARLES
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FILED BY DEFENDANT LI, CHARLES
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE FILED BY LEI, CRYSTAL LI, CHARLES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-17-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-17-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEI, CRYSTAL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LI, CHARLES CLAIMS FAIL DUE TO EXPIRED STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT AND BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SC-108) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEI, CRYSTAL
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT LI, CHARLES ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
(SC-108) ANSWER FILED. FILED BY DEFENDANT LI, CHARLES

ORDER ON (SC-108)REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAIMS). YOU MUST GO TO COURT IF YOU WANT TO BE HEARD. - PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID LAVINE - EXPLANATION FOR DECISION: PARTIES SHOULD BE PREPARED TO ADDRESS TERM OF STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS AND WHY/WHY NOT IT RAN BY TIME OF 08/30/11 CLAIM.
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR HEARING PER SC-108A ORDER HEARING SET FOR JAN-30-2012 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-30-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-30-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
HEARING PER SC-108A ORDER FILED BY CRYSTAL LEI ON JAN-30-2012 - DENIED. THE PLAINTIFF'S PETITION TO CORRECT OR CANCEL THE JUDGMENT IS DENIED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL.
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON 05/29/2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
